response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains — the core requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor’s thesis work and NI LabWindows, with no evidence of production-grade financial systems, SQL Server/Oracle expertise, or domain knowledge in fixed income or investment banking.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong track record in CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops infrastructure
Active open-source contributor with clear communication and teaching ability
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows in financial systems
Lacks documented SQL Server/Oracle usage in capital markets context
Domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking is absent
